name: ${project.name}
summary: Library for easy creating and handling of forms

versions.changelog:
## What's Changed
* feat: added api for element tooltips + refactor: remove debug command by @MEFRREEX in https://github.com/MEFRREEX/FormConstructor/pull/12


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MEFRREEX/FormConstructor/compare/3.0.0...3.1.0

## What's Changed
* Better dependency info by @IndianBartonka in https://github.com/MEFRREEX/FormConstructor/pull/5
* fix: mojang moment on 1.21.80 by @MEFRREEX in https://github.com/MEFRREEX/FormConstructor/pull/6
* fix: ignore also Header and Divider by @MEFRREEX in https://github.com/MEFRREEX/FormConstructor/pull/7
* feat: added method to change submit button text by @MEFRREEX in https://github.com/MEFRREEX/FormConstructor/pull/8
* feat: form updating + close form method by @MEFRREEX in https://github.com/MEFRREEX/FormConstructor/pull/9
* feat: close reason handler by @MEFRREEX in https://github.com/MEFRREEX/FormConstructor/pull/10
* feat: 3.0.0 update by @MEFRREEX in https://github.com/MEFRREEX/FormConstructor/pull/11

## New Contributors
* @IndianBartonka made their first contribution in https://github.com/MEFRREEX/FormConstructor/pull/5

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MEFRREEX/FormConstructor/compare/2.0.5...3.0.0
